name: Android JNI Archive Loader
description: Auto-attach jni.bnta and pull all JNI types for Android shared libraries.
longdescription: When an Android JNI ELF shared library is opened, automatically attach a local jni.bnta type archive and pull all JNI-related types into the BinaryView. Also provides a manual command.

installinstructions.Windows: Copy the plugin directory into your user plugins folder.
installinstructions.Darwin: Copy the plugin directory into your user plugins folder.
installinstructions.Linux: Copy the plugin directory into your user plugins folder.

author: Jerem1ah
